payload.answer: The new fact conflicts with the existing current fact because it says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72, while the current memory says Sam works at Goldman. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to treat the new fact as replacing the current Goldman employment fact; keep_both to retain both facts if you want to preserve ambiguity or historical context; reject_new to keep only the existing current fact and not commit the new one; edit to revise the new fact before saving.
